mission_title: Agent Fox Technical Core V1A-3C2 — Web With ComfyUI Helper Dependency Closure

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import ast, hashlib, json
root = Path(r"Z:\FOXAI")
drop = root / "AGENT_FOX_V1A3C2"
installed = root / "System" / "AgentFoxTechnicalCore"
checks = [
    (drop / "web_with_comfyui_helper_dependency_closure_v1.py", installed / "web_with_comfyui_helper_dependency_closure_v1.py", "253d291dcb148a6fc1e747718d269cb9b9a72fd22c1cdd6848fb8cc16eb3b7e0"),
    (drop / "WEB_WITH_COMFYUI_HELPER_DEPENDENCY_CONTRACT_V1.json", installed / "WEB_WITH_COMFYUI_HELPER_DEPENDENCY_CONTRACT_V1.json", "14a02d1c8e447e36b9ed7d3daec3f45e843770c7be1ee2e512be1672c51940c7"),
    (drop / "README_V1A3C2.md", installed / "README_V1A3C2.md", "91d7b5c76adae02f8e59ea8fb02b29f97c6865183b8c540147e176df5be9ea17"),
]
for source, target, expected in checks:
    assert source.is_file() and target.is_file(), (source, target)
    assert hashlib.sha256(source.read_bytes()).hexdigest() == expected, source
    assert hashlib.sha256(target.read_bytes()).hexdigest() == expected, target
script_text = (installed / "web_with_comfyui_helper_dependency_closure_v1.py").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
compile(script_text, str(installed / "web_with_comfyui_helper_dependency_closure_v1.py"), "exec")
tree = ast.parse(script_text)
imports = set()
for node in ast.walk(tree):
    if isinstance(node, ast.Import):
        imports.update(alias.name.split(".")[0] for alias in node.names)
    elif isinstance(node, ast.ImportFrom) and node.module:
        imports.add(node.module.split(".")[0])
forbidden = {"subprocess", "socket", "urllib", "http", "ftplib", "requests", "pip", "ensurepip", "psutil", "winreg", "ctypes", "webbrowser", "importlib"}
assert not (imports & forbidden), sorted(imports & forbidden)
contract = json.loads((installed / "WEB_WITH_COMFYUI_HELPER_DEPENDENCY_CONTRACT_V1.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert contract["mission_id"] == "ENG-20260721-222209-FFD6EF"
assert contract["target"]["context_id"] == "CTX-E47F4DAA05CBCD6B"
assert contract["target"]["path_group_id"] == "PATHGROUP-25300F3FBF74CEEB"
assert contract["expected_preliminary_topology"] == {"reached_source_count": 1, "dependency_edge_count": 0, "unresolved_branch_count": 1}
assert contract["called_launcher_relationship"]["linked_context_closure_rebuilt"] is False
assert contract["scope"]["rollback_drive_k_accessed"] is False
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3C2_INSTALL_PREFLIGHT_OK")

Run zero-byte-safe guard, optional, platform, deferred, and output-size regression self-tests
Verify immutable evidence, exact helper context, called-launcher relationship, and completed Web Portable baseline
Verify exact one-source helper topology before live source reading
Build one bounded Web With ComfyUI helper dependency closure from verified evidence
Run built-in V1A-3C2 output, hash, safety, single-read, link, and 8-MiB validators

argv:
from pathlib import Path, PureWindowsPath
import json
out = Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260721-222209-FFD6EF_V1A3C2_WEB_WITH_COMFYUI_HELPER_CLOSURE")
context_output = json.loads((out / "WEB_WITH_COMFYUI_HELPER_CONTEXT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
coverage = json.loads((out / "WEB_WITH_COMFYUI_HELPER_COVERAGE.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
closure = json.loads((out / "WEB_WITH_COMFYUI_HELPER_FIRST_PARTY_CLOSURE.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
requirements = json.loads((out / "WEB_WITH_COMFYUI_HELPER_PACKAGE_REQUIREMENTS.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
receipt = json.loads((out / "WEB_WITH_COMFYUI_HELPER_CLOSURE_RECEIPT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
def norm(value):
    return str(PureWindowsPath(str(value or ""))).casefold()
context = context_output["context"]
relationship = context_output["called_launcher_relationship"]
linked = context_output["linked_protected_context"]
assert context["context_id"] == "CTX-E47F4DAA05CBCD6B"
assert context["path_group_id"] == "PATHGROUP-25300F3FBF74CEEB"
assert norm(context["launcher_path"]) == norm("Z:/FOXAI/START_FOXAI_WEB_WITH_COMFYUI.bat")
assert norm(context["script_path"]) == norm("Z:/FOXAI/System/PortableRuntime/start_comfyui_quiet.py")
assert norm(context["resolved_interpreter_path"]) == norm("Z:/FOXAI/Runtime/Desktop/python/python.exe")
assert context["flags"] == ["-I", "-B", "-S"]
arguments = context["arguments"]
assert len(arguments) == 4
assert arguments[0] == "--root" and norm(arguments[1]) == norm("Z:/FOXAI")
assert arguments[2:] == ["--source", "webui"]
assert relationship["source_line"] == 58
assert norm(relationship["target_launcher_path"]) == norm("Z:/FOXAI/START_FOXAI_WEB_PORTABLE.bat")
assert linked["baseline_mission_id"] == "ENG-20260721-220855-64D244"
assert linked["baseline_context_id"] == "CTX-23820E95DB51A6C5"
assert linked["linked_context_closure_rebuilt"] is False
assert linked["linked_context_records_duplicated"] is False
assert closure["node_count"] == 1 and closure["edge_count"] == 0
assert coverage["preliminary_reached_source_count"] == 1
assert coverage["preliminary_dependency_edge_count"] == 0
assert coverage["preliminary_unresolved_branch_count"] == 1
assert coverage["called_launcher_link_count"] == 1
assert coverage["linked_context_closure_rebuilt"] is False
assert coverage["cartesian_all_imports_by_all_contexts_expansion"] is False
assert receipt["internal_deterministic_rebuild_match"] is True
assert receipt["interpreter_child_processes"] == 0 and receipt["shell_child_processes"] == 0
assert receipt["network_used"] is False and receipt["packages_installed"] is False and receipt["models_loaded"] is False
assert receipt["existing_foxai_source_modified"] is False
print(json.dumps({
    "status": "AGENT_FOX_V1A3C2_EXACT_CONTEXT_AND_LINK_VERIFIED",
    "context_id": context["context_id"],
    "path_group_id": context["path_group_id"],
    "node_count": closure["node_count"],
    "edge_count": closure["edge_count"],
    "preliminary_unresolved_branch_count": coverage["preliminary_unresolved_branch_count"],
    "called_launcher_target": relationship["target_launcher_path"],
    "linked_baseline_mission_id": linked["baseline_mission_id"],
    "probable_requirement_count": len(requirements.get("probable_module_load_candidates", [])),
}, sort_keys=True))
